name: 3 Cheese Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the bases of the asparagus and save them to make soup later. Boil the asparagus for 10 minutes in boiling water.
2. Cover a grill pan with aluminum foil. Lay the asparagus stalks on the foil.
3. Season with pepper.
4. Cover with slices of Brie, season, then cover the Brie with diced Cheddar, season, and cover the Cheddar with grated Mozzarella, season again.
5. Grill under hot heat for a few minutes until the cheese begins to brown.
6. Serve hot.
Haven't tried it with Parmesan topping but might be worth a shot.
